narrative:
Marysville 10 (precinct in Union County) has 758 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
